Vault-level index for the Obsidian symlink validation spike.

## Vault-native notes

- [[obsidian-spike]] — target of the cross-boundary wikilink from the project side
- [[async-patterns]] — filler note so graph view has more than one vault-native node

## Cross-boundary links into the symlinked project subtree

- [[projects/example/boundary-note|Example project boundary note]]
- [[projects/example/another-note|Example project — another note]]

If Obsidian resolves these wikilinks (vault-side → project-side through the
symlink), the file explorer, graph view, and link resolver are all working
across the boundary.
